query:
SELECT 
  wc.sessionId AS wc_sessionId, 
  wc.remoteJid AS wc_remoteJid,
  wc.lastStatus AS wc_lastStatus,
  wc.lastFromMe,
  m.sessionId AS msg_sessionId,
  m.remoteJid AS msg_remoteJid,
  m.status AS msg_status,
  m.fromMe AS msg_fromMe
FROM wa_conversations wc
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT m.sessionId, m.remoteJid, m.status, m.fromMe
  FROM messages m
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT sessionId, remoteJid, MAX(id) AS maxId
    FROM messages
    WHERE fromMe = 1
    GROUP BY sessionId, remoteJid
  ) latest ON m.id = latest.maxId
) m ON wc.sessionId = m.sessionId AND wc.remoteJid = m.remoteJid
WHERE wc.lastFromMe = 1
AND wc.remoteJid = '5521992797523@s.whatsapp.net'
